nasb.text: How blessed are the people who are so situated; How blessed are the people whose God is the Lord!

esv.text: Blessed are the people to whom such blessings fall! Blessed are the people whose God is the Lord!

cnv.text: 得享這樣景況的人民，是有福的， 有耶和華作他們　神的，這人是有福的。

ccb.text: 生活在这种光景里的人有福了！ 尊耶和华为上帝的人有福了！

csbs.text: 这样景况中的子民是蒙福的！ 以耶和华为神的子民是蒙福的！
